title: I get to be the one who breaks the pattern
subtitle: A release-and-allow statement for choosing forward when the family script says you won't.
excerpt: A short energy statement for when the inherited belief that getting ahead isn't possible for your family is running loud. The release names the pattern; the allow names the choice to step out of it.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 9 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when you can see clearly that a family pattern is running your money and you want a daily statement to set against it.

content.text: A short energy statement for the morning when the inherited belief is running loud. Say it standing, if you can: standing is the physical gesture that goes with this particular statement.
I am ready to release the belief that we never get ahead. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow being the one who breaks the pattern. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from Day 9 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure is drawn from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
